task: run_tui currently calculates input and output tokens and shows it to the user, can we configure this to work with actual cost also? So essentially we need to know which how much the users configured model costs in  agent.rs::run_tui() agent.rs::AgentConfig  config.rs::Profile config.rs::default_context_tokens() config.rs::ConfigFile config.rs::ResolvedConfig  config_view.rs::draw()

    #[serde(default)]
    pub cost_per_mtok_output: Option<f64>,
